query:
SELECT
                pi.store_path_hash,
                pi.store_path,
                pi.url,
                pi.compression,
                pi.nar_hash,
                pi.nar_size,
                pi.deriver,
                pi.ca
            FROM path_infos pi
            WHERE pi.store_path_hash = ?
                AND EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM aggregate_visible_paths avp
                    WHERE avp.store_path_hash = pi.store_path_hash
                )
            LIMIT 1
